title: Noob Villagers 2
description: This resource pack will add 24 emotes for the villagers.
body:
# NOOB VILLAGERS 2
![Noob Villagers 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad22eaa2ecb4a0a1c918e3bd38c7dca413e30cc.jpeg)
### Are you bored with the normal villagers!
You can change that boring thing with this resource pack. **Noob Villagers 2** is an upgrade from my **Noob Villagers** resource pack. Noob Villagers 2 will add **24** different expressions to the villagers with a certain rate, they will appear randomly. Of course, the appearance rate will not be high to make them more interesting.

**I'll spoil a bit if you want to know.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0765928b8db699fcf6ffbc7f51079c6688813368.jpeg)

</details>

## Required Optifine or ETF
